title: lactuca virosa subsp. virosa
intro: Lactuca virosa subsp. virosa, commonly known as wild lettuce or prickly lettuce, is a plant species in the dandelion tribe, characterized by its bitter leaves and milky sap. The medicinal properties of Lactuca virosa subsp. virosa lie in its ability to induce a calming and sedative effect, making it a natural remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate muscle spasms, menstrual cramps, and other painful conditions. Lactuca virosa subsp. virosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
